name: Broad validation (full Vitest suite, Linux container)
description: Build artifacts then run the full Vitest suite in a Linux container. The suite is container-equivalent: OS-specific code (Windows registry, scheduled tasks, .lnk shortcuts, VS Code/APPDATA paths) is tested through injected platform/execFile params and tmpdir-scoped env, not real syscalls, so all 317 test files pass on Linux once dist/ and src/dashboard-ui/routeTree.gen.ts are generated by the build.

execution.networkJustification: npm ci requires the public npm registry to install dependencies; node_modules is not pre-staged. No other network access is needed once install completes.

commands.name: typecheck
commands.run: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:ui

liveExecution.approvalReason: Project owner approved the live VPS Docker run with bridge networking for npm ci.

forbidden: Do not run GUI, MSI, installer, or registry-mutating validation in this lane
Do not access network beyond the npm registry during npm ci
Do not run on an active local desktop runner
Do not store secrets or API keys in this profile
